title: camellia sinensis var. lasiocalyx
intro: Camellia sinensis var. lasiocalyx, also known as the Assam tea plant, is a subspecies of the Camellia sinensis plant, a flowering evergreen shrub native to Asia. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Camellia sinensis var. lasiocalyx are numerous, including reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Camellia sinensis var. lasiocalyx is commonly prepared as a tea, as well as in capsule or tincture form, and can also be used in skincare products and other herbal preparations.
